text: I think you're asking me to send that as the second message through the proxy, not asking me directly. Let me continue the captured session:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9999 claude --dangerously-skip-permissions -c -p \"Which of those crates has the most complex code? Show me the top 3 functions by line count.\" 2>&1", "description": "Turn 2: find complex functions", "timeout": 120000}
